```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.1fr;gap:1.5em;align-items:center;">

 <div style="position:relative;aspect-ratio:1;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;">
  <div style="position:absolute;width:100%;height:100%;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid #3A7DC9;background:rgba(58,125,201,0.04);display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center;padding-top:0.5em;">
   <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#3A7DC9;letter-spacing:0.16em;font-weight:700;">HARNESS</span>
  </div>
  <div style="position:absolute;width:65%;height:65%;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid #C4881A;background:rgba(196,136,26,0.06);display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center;padding-top:0.5em;">
   <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#C4881A;letter-spacing:0.14em;font-weight:700;">CONTEXT</span>
  </div>
  <div style="position:absolute;width:35%;height:35%;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid #7B2CBF;background:rgba(123,44,191,0.08);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;">
   <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#7B2CBF;letter-spacing:0.14em;font-weight:700;">PROMPT</span>
  </div>
 </div>

 <div style="text-align:left;">
  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.4em;">not replacement</div>
  <div style="font-size:0.95em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:0.7em;">
   The three are a <span style="color:#3A7DC9;font-weight:700;">containment relationship</span>.
  </div>
  <ul style="list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0;font-size:0.6em;line-height:1.7;color:#564232;">
   <li style="display:flex;gap:0.5em;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:0.2em;"><span style="color:#7B2CBF;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;flex-shrink:0;">▸</span>Prompt = how you phrase it</li>
   <li style="display:flex;gap:0.5em;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:0.2em;"><span style="color:#C4881A;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;flex-shrink:0;">▸</span>Context = everything the model sees</li>
   <li style="display:flex;gap:0.5em;align-items:flex-start;"><span style="color:#3A7DC9;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;flex-shrink:0;">▸</span>Harness = the whole runtime around it</li>
  </ul>
 </div>

</div>
```
